reasoning: Charming design: box/chest body with an organic plant sprouting from the top gives clear personality and a friendly toy quality. Silhouette at 4x is crisp and instantly readable — rounded torso, stubby feet, distinctive green crown — passes the sticker test. On dark backgrounds (panels 2 and 3) contrast is strong; white and green elements pop cleanly. Main weakness: on the light/cream background (panel 4) the white torso bleeds into the background, losing edge definition on roughly half the body; only the green top and darker outline pixels hold the silhouette. At 1x (panel 1) the figure resolves to a small green-topped blob — character type is guessable but fine detail is lost. Charm is present and the design avoids aggressive/edgy shapes, but the light-bg contrast gap prevents a confident pass.
